perFrameCode: // this echoes the value of the "beat" variable for one more frame after a beat so that both "sparks" are drawn highlighted (on consecutive frames)
// xpos and ypos are calculated as springs being acted on by a variable force, comprised of vol and bass_att or treb_att.
